title: Tamil Nadu Cabinet expansion: IUML and VCK get their ministers Shahjahan and Vanni Arasu in Vijay's government
description: IUML's AM Shahjahan and VCK's Vanni Arasu were sworn in as ministers in Tamil Nadu Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay's expanding Cabinet on Friday, as the TVK-led government continues to broaden its coalition with fresh inductions across alliance partners.
